ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the iteration belongs */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "iteration_status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the iteration */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End timestamp of the iteration */,
  "iteration_description" TEXT /* Changes made in this iteration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the iteration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., F1:class=0, F1:class=1, F1:class=2) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class for which the metric is calculated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin, stakeholder) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or iteration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model or iteration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model or iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
